s1.ptxt: Apply parking brake and block wheels.
Set ignition “ON”, shift select lever to “N” range.
Remove adjuster case (cable end) from select lever pin of select lever assembly.
Release lock plate (1) which restricts moving of lock piece (2).
Pull out lock piece (2) from adjuster case (3) using pliers to disengage cable.
Check that needle direction shaped on lock washer (2) and “N” reference line (1) on transmission range sensor are aligned.
Apply grease to select lever pin (1), and then install adjuster case (2) into select lever pin securely.
Push lock piece (3) in arrow direction [a] as shown in figure.
Slide lock plate (4) in arrow direction [b] as shown in figure until it gets over the claw (5).
After installing select cable, check the following.

item.ptxt: Check back-up light turns ON when shifting select lever to “R” range.
Check shift position indicated information display is consistent with select lever range.
Check engine can start in “P” and “N” ranges and cannot start in other ranges.
